scripts.deploy:one-line: yarn build && echo 'Deploying to branch "gh-web-site" worktree dir at location ../../git-smart-checkout-pages' && ([ -d ../../git-smart-checkout-pages ] || (echo 'Error: directory ../../git-smart-checkout-pages does not exist' && exit 1)) && cp -r dist/. ../../git-smart-checkout-pages/ && cd ../../git-smart-checkout-pages && git add . && git commit -m 'Update website build' && echo 'Deployed to gh-web-site branch'
